name: story
description: Generate a short story, get feedback from a critic, then refine it

arguments.name: topic
arguments.description: What the story should be about

draft.name: Write Draft
draft.prompt:
Write a short story (3-4 paragraphs) about: $1

Make it vivid and engaging. Include at least 2 named characters.

critique.name: Critique

refine.name: Refine

default.system_prompt: You are a creative fiction writer. Write vivid, engaging prose. Output only the story text, no meta-commentary.

critic.system_prompt: You are a tough but fair literary critic. Give specific, actionable feedback. Be concise — bullet points only.
